description: Current vaccination and standard macrolide treatment.
modified_control_levers: Country-specific vaccine schedule and coverage; standard macrolide treatment and PEP assumptions.

description: Raise routine infant and childhood vaccine coverage without lowering countries that already exceed the scenario floor.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor updates: infant_3_11m at least 0.82, child_1_4y at least 0.96, child_5_9y at least 0.94.
interpretation_note: Tests marginal gains in high-coverage profiles; not evidence against maintaining routine childhood vaccination.

description: Add or scale up a school-age/adolescent booster while retaining the current aP-like mechanism.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor update: adolescent_10_17y at least 0.90; VE_inf retained at 0.25.
interpretation_note: Program-extension scenario using the current aP-like mechanism rather than a new product profile.

description: Scale up Tdap during pregnancy for direct early-infant protection through passive antibody transfer.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor update: infant_0_2m maternal-protection entry at least 0.75; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d.
interpretation_note: Models direct pregnancy Tdap protection for newborns and avoids changing routine infant DTaP coverage.

description: Represent Tdap-up-to-date close contacts and caregivers around infants as a conservative cocooning/contact-reduction adjunct.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor update: young_adult_18_39y at least 0.55; young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 15%.
interpretation_note: Cocooning alone is treated as difficult to implement and insufficient as a replacement for pregnancy Tdap.

description: Represent a consensus-aligned composite infant-exposure reduction strategy combining pregnancy Tdap scale-up and close-contact/cocooning adjuncts.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor updates: infant_0_2m maternal-protection entry at least 0.75 and young_adult_18_39y at least 0.55; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d; young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 15%.
interpretation_note: Composite proxy, not maternal immunization alone or passive antibody protection alone; eTable 17 decomposes pregnancy Tdap, adult boosting, and cocooning components.

description: Improve PEP reach among household contacts, infants, and high-risk infant settings.
modified_control_levers: PEP coverage among eligible household/high-risk contacts increased to 0.45.
interpretation_note: Represents targeted PEP among guideline-prioritized contacts, not broad community prophylaxis.

description: Isolate direct infant protection from transplacental antibody transfer.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor update: infant_0_2m maternal-protection entry at least 0.75; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d.
interpretation_note: Excludes adult boosting and cocooning to decompose the infant-exposure reduction strategy.

description: Isolate recent reproductive-age adult boosting that lowers infection and transmission risk in young adults.
modified_control_levers: Coverage floor update: young_adult_18_39y recent-boosting proxy at least 0.55.
interpretation_note: Excludes direct infant antibody protection and cocooning.

description: Isolate reduced household-to-infant transmission from close-contact/cocooning assumptions.
modified_control_levers: Young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 15% for infant_0_2m and infant_3_11m targets.
interpretation_note: Excludes direct infant antibody protection and adult boosting.

description: Use resistance-aware testing, alternative treatment, and restored PEP effectiveness for resistant infections.
modified_control_levers: Resistant infection updates: infectious-duration reduction 0.45 and infectiousness reduction 0.35; symptomatic treatment rate 0.065; resistant-strain PEP effectiveness 0.45.
interpretation_note: Depends on testing reach, uptake, treatment selection, and PEP implementation; near-term sensitivity is in eTable 16.

description: Represent an improved high-transmission-blocking pertussis vaccine profile.
modified_control_levers: Uses next_generation vaccine profile: VE_sus 0.80, VE_sym 0.90, VE_inf 0.65, VE_dur 0.40.
interpretation_note: Mechanistic upper-bound profile motivated by candidate mucosal or high-transmission-blocking platforms; pipeline mapping is in eTable 27.

interpretive_status: Mechanistic upper-bound package, not policy package
description: Combine transmission-blocking vaccine assumptions, pregnancy Tdap-based infant protection, close-contact adjuncts, adolescent boosting, targeted PEP, and resistance-guided management.
modified_control_levers: Uses transmission_blocking vaccine profile; coverage floors for infant_0_2m maternal protection 0.75, adolescent_10_17y 0.90, and young_adult_18_39y 0.55; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d; young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 15%; targeted PEP coverage 0.45; resistance-guided treatment and resistant-strain PEP updates.
interpretation_note: Stress-test scenario for combined mechanisms; not an externally validated implementation package.
